steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic report written to reports/diagnostic_report.md. Bidirectional type conditioning verified: no new collapse modes, loss decreases normally, log_det_per_dof comparable to hyp_003.

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: Plan sub-report written to reports/plan_report.md and approved by Postdoc.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: 6-config architectural ablation completed (3000 steps each). Any config reaches mean valid_fraction > 0.30.

result.notes: No config exceeded 0.20 mean VF. D_pos best at 17.65%. Proceeding to full run as best config — pos_enc adds ~5ppt over baseline. Sweep confirms lr=5e-5 margially best (17.73%). All configs saturate at loss=0.869 by step 150.

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.acceptance: Top 2 configs identified from ablation. If no config meets promising criterion, document and proceed to next angle or report failure.

result.bs256_runs_skipped: LR spread <0.5ppt; bs=128 results conclusive. Remaining 3 bs=256 runs not needed.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run on best ablation config (D_pos). valid_fraction evaluated on all 8 molecules. n_steps=10000.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: SBG recipe validation run (3000 steps) on D_pos config. Promising if valid_fraction > best SANITY full result.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: Sweep completed. Best config selected. Sweep URL logged.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run (20000 steps) on best sweep config. Final evaluation on all 8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.reason: Loss saturates at step ~150 across ALL 6 ablation configs — identical to hyp_003 saturation. Increasing capacity will not escape the alpha_pos equilibrium. Condition for skipping from plan: 'saturation by step 150'. Confirmed.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice; all new code promoted.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_004; pre-merge checks pass.
